case_title: SZOPIER DBA DAVID & DEBORAH BOWMAN VS BAHRAM DEAN ANSARI DBA OXYGEN & DRAGON ENTERPRISE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SZOPIER DBA DAVID & DEBORAH BOWMAN AS TO DEFENDANT BAHRAM DEAN ANSARI DBA OXYGEN & DRAGON ENTERPRISE BAHRAM DEAN ANSARI DBA DRAGON ENTERPRISE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAHRAM DEAN ANSARI DBA OXYGEN & DRAGON ENTERPRISE

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BAHRAM DEAN ANSARI DBA OXYGEN & DRAGON ENTERPRISE BAHRAM DEAN ANSARI DBA DRAGON ENTERPRISE INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SZOPIER DBA DAVID & DEBORAH BOWMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SZOPIER DBA DAVID & DEBORAH BOWMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAHRAM DEAN ANSARI DBA OXYGEN & DRAGON ENTERPRISE $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $715.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BAHRAM DEAN ANSARI DBA OXYGEN & DRAGON ENTERPRISE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SZOPIER DBA DAVID & DEBORAH BOWMAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
